Build AI Agents That Remember Everything: OpenClaw + Gemini Embedding 2

Learn how to combine OpenClaw and Gemini Embedding 2 to build powerful AI agents with multimodal memory. This setup allows your assistants to process and remember text, images, audio, and video for next-level automation.
